values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

There are conflicts in ldiskfs series:
fs/ext4/mballoc.c.rej
fs/ext4/namei.c.rej
fs/ext4/inode.c.rej
fs/ext4/mballoc.h.rej
fs/ext4/super.c.rej
fs/ext4/balloc.c.rej

Patch Set 5:

fwiw ... testing the updated patches:
  linux-6.5/ext4-data-in-dirent.patch
  linux-6.5/ext4-pdirop.patch
The update adjusts:
  linux-6.5/ext4-data-in-dirent.patch
so that it can be used by el9.4 series directly.

However it appears to be the case that el94 will now require:
  https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/52266/23 (LU-17085 llite: safely duplicate iov_iter)
to pass migration tests ... at least on my local testing.

Patch Set 5:

> Patch Set 5:
> 
> fwiw ... testing the updated patches:
>   linux-6.5/ext4-data-in-dirent.patch
>   linux-6.5/ext4-pdirop.patch
> The update adjusts:
>   linux-6.5/ext4-data-in-dirent.patch
> so that it can be used by el9.4 series directly.
> 
> However it appears to be the case that el94 will now require:
>   https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/52266/23 (LU-17085 llite: safely duplicate iov_iter)
> to pass migration tests ... at least on my local testing.

So now I have had some time to dig a little further.
sanity/56x fails on el6.4 and passes on 6.6.
The el6.4 port of the ITER_UBUF is slightly broken w.r.t. iter_iov().
Updated https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/52266 to explicitly handle ITER_UBUF

Patch Set 5:

(1 comment)

Update 6.6 kernel series so el9.4 can use linux-6.5/ext4-data-in-dirent.patch directly.

Also this needs to on top of linux-6.5/ext4-data-in-dirent.patch to fix the el9.4 client

parents.subject: LU-17986 tests: Update sanity-lnet 111 for IPv6

commit.subject: LU-17404 kernel: RHEL 9.4 server support
commit.message:
LU-17404 kernel: RHEL 9.4 server support

This patch makes changes to support RHEL 9.4 release
with kernel 5.14.0-427.20.1.el9_4 for Lustre server.

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el9.3 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el9.3 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.3 serverdistro=el9.4 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.3 serverdistro=el9.4 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: optional clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el9.4 \
  testgroup=full-part-1

Test-Parameters: optional clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el9.4 \
  testgroup=full-part-2

Test-Parameters: optional clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el9.4 \
  testgroup=full-part-3

Change-Id: I4741041c6b7f5604b13523a24060b6a2804a5ef2
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54713
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: Yang Sheng <ys@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
